# CFB Social

> CFB Social is a free college football fan community and the home for EA Sports College Football 27 (CFB 27) players. Fans post takes, debate rivalries, track the transfer portal, and use the Game Room to share dynasty screenshots, build flip-magazines of their season, and find online dynasty leagues to join across PS5, Xbox, and PC.

CFB Social is not affiliated with or endorsed by EA Sports or Electronic Arts. All College Football 27 content is user-generated.

## Game Room (College Football 27)

- [Game Room](https://www.cfbsocial.com/game-room): Share College Football 27 dynasty screenshots ("moments"), curate them into a magazine, and find online leagues.
- [Online Dynasty Leagues](https://www.cfbsocial.com/game-room/leagues): Directory of open CFB 27 online dynasty leagues to join, filterable by platform (PS5, Xbox, PC), cross-play, sim schedule, and open schools.
- [Game Room Guide](https://www.cfbsocial.com/game-room/guide): How to share moments, build an issue, and join an online dynasty.

## Key answers

- Where to share College Football 27 screenshots: the CFB Social Game Room Moments tab. Each upload posts to your feed and can be added to your magazine.
- How to find a CFB 27 online dynasty league: browse the Leagues directory at /game-room/leagues, then open a league in the Game Room to get the join code and request a spot.
- Cost: free. Listing a league and joining are free.
- Platforms: PS5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC.

## Main sections

- [Feed](https://www.cfbsocial.com/feed): College football takes and debates.
- [Schools](https://www.cfbsocial.com/schools): Fan hubs for 653 FBS and FCS programs, each with that school's College Football 27 dynasty moments.
- [Transfer Portal](https://www.cfbsocial.com/portal): Transfer portal tracking.
- [War Room](https://www.cfbsocial.com/war-room): Live game-day threads.
